title: dyssodia aurantia
intro: Dyssodia aurantia, also known as orange mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its bright yellow flowers and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues. Dyssodia aurantia has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to reap its health benefits, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
